notes: First-in-human D+Q senolytic trial (Mayo Clinic 2019); 14 patients with diabetic kidney disease; 3-day D+Q significantly reduced p16/p21 markers and SASP factors in adipose and skin; small proof-of-concept study

STAMINA pilot 2025 (Lancet EBioMedicine); 12 older adults with slow gait and mild cognitive impairment; intermittent D+Q (100mg dasatinib + 1250mg quercetin, 2 days every 2 weeks x6 cycles); established feasibility and preliminary safety signals
2025 GeroScience study: D+Q affects chromatin remodeling in young and senescent vascular smooth muscle cells; mechanistic insight into vascular biology effects
Examine.com overview covering antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, blood pressure, and bioavailability evidence; notes modest human RCT evidence and low bioavailability of standard quercetin
